summary: FMC's rimisoxafen deal with Corteva aims to expand access to dual-mode herbicide technology for corn and soybean markets across the Americas.

headline: Citigroup Upgrades Albemarle to Buy, Maintains Price Target to $225
summary: Citigroup  analyst Patrick Cunningham   upgrades Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) from Neutral to Buy and maintains the price target from $225 to $225.

headline: Citi sees this stock as primary lithium demand beneficiary, upgrades to Buy
summary: Investing.com -- Investing.com - Citi upgraded Albemarle shares to Buy from High Risk on Thursday, pointing to underappreciated growth opportunities in the lithium market despite recent spot price weakness. The bank kept its $225 price target on the stock.

headline: DOW's Stock Rallies 39% YTD: What's Driving the Upside?
summary: DOW shares have surged 39% YTD, fueled by cost cuts, productivity gains and growth projects in cost-advantaged regions amid macro challenges.
